data.body: Story 4e19 CLAIMED + RED established. Oracle authored: tests/unit/test_audit_plan_review_v2.py (decide+build_payload) + tests/interfaces/store/test_sidecar_reader.py (reader v1/v2) + updated existing contract tests (test_sidecar_enrichment, test_plan_review:749, test_sidecar_reader:66 v1->v2). RED confirmed: KeyError block_threshold/scenarios, schema v1!=v2. HELD OUT to scratch: pass3_decide-all-paths, pass3_over_findings-per-criterion threading, reader v1/v2 back-compat. Implementer sees only happy-path (4 RED) + green invariant guards. Launching held-out impl subagent.
